message:
feat(btrfs): add comprehensive btrfs structure parsing support

Added 281 lines of btrfs on-disk format definitions and parsers:

Constants:
- BTRFS_ROOT_TREE_OBJECTID (1) and BTRFS_FS_TREE_OBJECTID (5)
- Item type constants: INODE_ITEM, DIR_ITEM, DIR_INDEX, EXTENT_DATA, ROOT_ITEM
- Directory entry types: REG_FILE, DIR, CHRDEV, BLKDEV, FIFO, SOCK, SYMLINK
- File extent types: INLINE, REG, PREALLOC

Structures:
- BtrfsRootItem: Parsed root item with bytenr and level for tree bootstrapping
- BtrfsInodeItem: Complete inode metadata (size, nbytes, nlink, uid, gid,
  mode, rdev, timestamps with nanosecond precision)
- BtrfsDirItem: Decoded directory entry with child objectid, key type,
  offset, file type, and name bytes
- BtrfsExtentData: Enum for inline and regular extent data with disk/file
  offsets and compression support

This provides the foundation for read-only btrfs filesystem access in the
FrankenFS VFS layer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
